title: Hybrid Code Q&A retrieval — semantic + FTS + git-log

steps.description: Database: doc_index_jobs table (mirrors code_index_jobs with items_* counter rename) + ORM DocIndexJob + Alembic migration (up/down) + project/status indexes

RAG indexing: orch/rag/doc_indexer.py (LanceDB docs_{project_id} + SentenceSplitter + Ollama + updated_at watermark), orch/rag/doc_job.py (DocIndexJobRunner + JOB_REGISTRY_DOC), jobs/aggregator.py extension with JobType.doc_indexing

RAG retrieval: implement _retrieve_evidence_bundle (semantic+FTS+git-log), _fetch_full_work_items, rebalance _merge_and_rank_work_items to α=0.45 FTS / γ=0.35 semantic / β=0.20 git-log (sum=1.0), _build_workitem_system_prompt (top-3 full + 4-8 chunks + relevance filter), citation snippet prefers functional_doc_content[:300], wire citation_allowlist.filter_citations into SSE emission
Daemon: orch/daemon/doc_index_poller.py (stall timeout 600s, MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS_PER_PROJECT=1) + recover_orphaned_doc_index_jobs on boot + wire into daemon main loop
API: POST /project/{project_id}/api/code/reindex-docs (200 on new enqueue, 409 on concurrent, 404 on unknown project); reuse existing code_job_status.html fragment for response
Frontend: Re-index Docs dropdown entry in dashboard/templates/project_code.html (placed directly below Re-index changed files) + parameterise code_job_status.html for doc_indexing label
Cross-layer tests: Boundary Behavior + Invariant coverage, cross-project isolation, code_only regression guard, relevance-filter regression eval (F-A/CR-B/CR-C button scenario)
Final cross-layer review: indexing/retrieval contract, DB symmetry vs code_index_jobs, prompt-budget discipline, daemon orphan recovery, AC1-AC6 coverage, no regressions to answer_stream (code-only)

QV: Browser verification — Re-index Docs button enqueues and completes; workitem-aware question cites originating item and narrates functional-doc reasoning; relevance filter drops off-topic items; allowlist strips hallucinated IDs; code_only regression
